tests.proofTarget: valid monitor names are accepted from current snapshot
tests.whatItProves: candidate names present in the current fixture snapshot validate

tests.proofTarget: missing, stale, and unsafe monitor names reject
tests.whatItProves: empty, unknown, command-like, and path-like names do not pass oracle validation
monitor names can be parsed from fixture hyprctl monitors output
a previously valid name is rejected after a current snapshot no longer contains it
cursor.default_monitor ProductionWrite rejects without oracle proof and accepts with complete proof

tests.proofTarget: temp fixture write through gated production path
tests.whatItProves: valid oracle proof plus high-risk gate proof can write and reread a temp config only
tests.whatItDoesNotProve: real config mutation or live Hyprland reload behavior
